{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230347112A1261A208EF9D63E062"}"},"total":2282},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7043749405908321024","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"优秀，和常见的九叔僵尸文开局满级与万界人妻不同，剧情没有太过冗杂，而是精简凝练，合理嫁接，主角性格爱憎分明，重杀伐，不是平平无奇，也不是一步登天，体现了正常人的逻辑思维，是我看过的最好的九叔拜师文，没有之一。作者还没有更完，希望再接再厉，五星好评。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1640000714,"group_id":"7036276256819645443","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"磕学是第一生产力","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2fxp1wwRAy0h2iTgZrcurHCsBqgC8RrzlAubwVs/Z9i","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/051cf8a223a849f9be9ee23c2a54ce61~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789069&x-signature=YBD9NuTxvvpoDiYqrRyWrDhJaAk%3D","user_id":"1847645015644989","user_name":"银河维克特利2"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1847645015644989","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7036276256819645443","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一部描写九叔世界的小说，里面有九叔、有神、有鬼、有妖，也有巫术和蛊术，还有盗墓。
更有远古的传承，另外这本书前期没有女主，任婷婷更不会是女主，就这样…其次，
你想一开始就看到飞天遁地，这里没有…
你想一开始看到成佛做主，这里也没有…
总之，主角不会上来就秒天秒地秒空气。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d3fe1de132f6b662ea667d1a68f188d3","author":"本是俗夫","author_id":"","book_id":"7036276256819645443","book_name":"开局拜师九叔","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e8b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4315人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":81,"name":"盗墓","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=81&name=盗墓&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7036279915393745423","read_count":"4315","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"691504"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"333","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,盗墓,灵异,九叔,开局,同人,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e3ec738529d1e09d78636a9155c9cbad~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392832&x-signature=g3JAT13mp3c6XKAidjX9mGCD7T4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"commo
